transaction.additional_relevant_info: LC payment against documents for machinery. Beneficiary bank in Iran; ITSR prohibits U.S. persons from facilitating such transactions.

case_facts.alert_trigger: Automated screening — beneficiary financial institution in Iran (Bank Tejarat)
case_facts.sanctions_nexus: Payment would have been processed through Iranian financial institution; ITSR prohibits dealings with Iranian banks and Iran-related transactions by U.S. persons
